== Notes for [[Item:Q57618|Q57618]] ==

Alonso de Santa Cruz was one of the most important cartographers and cosmographers of Spain during the Age of Discovery and one of the most representative figures in the House of Trade (Casa de la Contratacion de las Indias)

http://dbe.rah.es/biografias/7499/alonso-de-santa-cruz

https://archive.org/stream/johncabotdiscove00harrrich/johncabotdiscove00harrrich_djvu.txt

https://archive.org/stream/elvenecianosebas01medirich/elvenecianosebas01medirich_djvu.txt

http://www.larramendi.es/i18n/catalogo_imagenes/grupo.do?path=1023266

https://books.google.se/books?id=SMjDfI5wUBEC&pg=PA39&dq=francisco+de+santa+cruz+maria+villalpando&hl=en&sa=X&ved=0ahUKEwipreyczuPeAhUF6CwKHUCpBsgQ6AEILzAB#v=onepage&q=francisco%20de%20santa%20cruz%20maria%20villalpando&f=false

http://www.archivesportaleurope.net/ead-display/-/ead/pl/aicode/ES-41091-AGI10/type/fa/id/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1916099/unitid/ES-41091-AGI-UD-1916099+-+ES-41091-AGI-UD-122362/search/0/Francisco+de+Santa+Cruz

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
